properties.name: Galicia
properties.polygon_basis: Approximate boundary of the Austro-Hungarian Kingdom of Galicia and Lodomeria as it existed until 1918. Extended from Kraków in the west (western Galicia) through Lviv/Lemberg (eastern Galicia) to the Zbruch River in the east, bordered by the Carpathians to the south. Shape is a simplified hand-drawn approximation, not a survey-grade boundary.
